title: Gemmy Rocky Balboa animated figure — gear and stage
itemDetails:
Gemmy Industries Rocky Balboa animated talking figure (Pop Culture Series, circa 2002; Limited Edition / collector packaging common). Licensed Rocky (1976 film) collectible: ~18 in (45 cm) figure in red boxing gloves, white trunks with red stripe, white boots; stands on blue boxing-ring base with white star mat, red corner posts, red ropes, and ROCKY logo on front apron. Electromechanical: multiple internal motors and plastic gear train (repair notes reference four motors in body truck), speaker and PCB in base, faulty switch common on aged units. Features boxing-arm motion, head turn, mouth movement, ~20 movie phrases, and songs including Gonna Fly Now and Eye of the Tiger. Weak point in original design: feet attach to stage via small pins while head/body are heavy—feet break off under load. Sold via retailers such as JCPenney and KB Toys. Market: secondary-market collectible; boxed examples vary widely by condition. Sources: Gemmy wiki / Pop Culture listings; eBay sold listings.

Photo/product ID T-00030 — 2026-05-17.
repairDetails:
Gemmy Rocky boxing figure — motion/sound, gears, leg mounts.
